value.claim: His belief in others' independent personhood is the source/input of his practice
value.correct_statement: The belief is downstream of the practice, not the source of it — the practice produces the belief

facts.value: Belief is produced as an output of practice, not held as an input; he performs treatment of others as independent persons until he believes they are
Conviction/belief; his method ends in conviction which has no slot for the integration question
Cannot interrogate his own love/conviction from outside because his practice induces the belief from within — 'there is no outside'

behavioral_states.response: Pretends and treats them as an independent person with their own thoughts, fears, desires, until the treatment produces genuine belief in their independence
behavioral_states.observable: The performed treatment; the seeing becomes 'real by the time it operates'
distinguish_from: conscious self-deception he can step outside of

negations.claim: His belief in others' independent personhood is the source/input of his practice
negations.correct_statement: The belief is downstream of the practice, not the source of it — the practice produces the belief
